title: Senior Product Designer (Clinical)
_verificationNote: Verified live via browse.py (200, full job description rendered). Published April 3, 2026. Counsel Health — AI-native medical group, $35M raised (a16z, Google Ventures, Pear VC), founded 2023. Senior Product Designer (Clinical) partners with clinical leaders to invent new paradigms for AI-enabled care delivery workflows. Owns clinical product end-to-end: advice/coaching, prescriptions, labs, referrals. 5+ years required; clinical product experience and early-stage startup background preferred. Competitive salary + equity. NYC hybrid, Boston hybrid, or Remote US. DISTINCT from existing entry counsel-health-senior-product-designer-consumer (ID: 385e95d2, patient-facing Consumer role) — this role is clinician-facing.
